title: Conveyor Handoff Routing: Minimal-SWAP Transpilation on a Warehouse Floor
strategies: identity placement + per-task shortest-path routing (trivial baseline)
zone-aware greedy embedding of the handoff graph onto the floor (greedy)
greedy embedding + local-search refinement + lookahead endpoint choice (strong)
true minimal-SWAP routing / optimal token-swapping schedule (NP-hard, open ceiling, uncovered)
